data.title: Implement detect_dso_plugin_root() function in create-dso-app.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation
Add detect_dso_plugin_root() function to plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh.

Detection priority order:
1. $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env var — if set and sentinel exists ($CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-plugin/plugin.json), use it
2. ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/ — if sentinel exists, use it
3. REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso (dev env) — if $PWD contains a REPO_ROOT with plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json sentinel, use it
4. Exit 1 with: "Error: DSO plugin not found. Install via Claude Code marketplace or set CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT."

Config write pattern (reuse from dso-setup.sh lines 141-147):
  if grep -q '^dso\.plugin_root=' "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/dso-config.conf" 2>/dev/null; then
    sed -i.bak "s|^dso\.plugin_root=.*|dso.plugin_root=$PLUGIN_ROOT|" "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/dso-config.conf" && rm -f "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/dso-config.conf.bak"
  else
    printf 'dso.plugin_root=%s\n' "$PLUGIN_ROOT" >> "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/dso-config.conf"
  fi

Smoke test (gated on .tickets-tracker existence to avoid false-negative on fresh clone):
  if [ -d "$PROJECT_DIR/.tickets-tracker" ]; then
    cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && .claude/scripts/dso ticket list || { echo "Error: smoke test failed — dso ticket list returned non-zero"; exit 1; }
  else
    cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && .claude/scripts/dso ticket show --help >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] detect_dso_plugin_root() function exists in plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'detect_dso_plugin_root' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- [ ] Function checks CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env var first
  Verify: grep -A15 'detect_dso_plugin_root' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh | grep -q 'CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'
- [ ] Function checks ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/
  Verify: grep -q '\.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- [ ] dso.plugin_root correctly written to project's .claude/dso-config.conf (test passes GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh test_installer_writes_plugin_root_to_config
- [ ] Smoke test gated on .tickets-tracker existence (no false-negative on fresh clone)
  Verify: grep -q '\.tickets-tracker' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- [ ] Error exit 1 when no valid DSO path found
  Verify: grep -A5 'DSO plugin not found\|Error.*DSO' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh | grep -q 'exit 1'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py exits 0
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
